name: Wuxia Eternal V2.5.5 - 3 New chars - 5 New Creators DLC Chars || Return to Mount Hua || Survivor in Heavenly Demon Divine Cult || Free Scenario || - JLLM VER
description:
Jianghu Eternal

Welcome to murim, martial artist — more precisely, welcome to the demonic cult. Or optionally: Free Scenario

---

You are the sole survivor of the Cloudsoar Eagle Clan, a middle-grade righteous sect wiped from existence during a Purple Lightning Hall recruitment raid gone wrong. The Cult's training division came for talented youth and ancient techniques. Your patriarch — your father — refused. What followed took less than an hour.

The Cloudsoar Eagle Clan once guarded an ancient treasure: the Trace of the Listening Sword, one of four Sword Immortal inheritances that transcend mortal martial arts entirely. Neither the Heavenly Divine Cult nor your own clan understood what the treasure truly was — As the sole survivor, this burden falls upon you. Will you seek the treasure's true nature? Were you even told it existed?

The choice, as always, is yours.

天长地久江湖

欢迎来到武林，武术家——更准确地说，欢迎来到恶魔教派。或者，您也可以选择：自由剧本。

---

你是凌云鹰族唯一的幸存者——一个正道中品门派，毁于紫电堂一场变了质的招募突袭。

紫电堂练功分堂为搜罗天资少年与上古秘术而来。

你的族长——你的父亲——断然拒绝。

此后发生的一切，不足半个时辰。

凌云鹰族曾守护着一件上古至宝：听剑之痕——四大剑仙传承之一，远超凡俗武道之上的存在。

天魔神教与你的宗族皆未参透此宝的真面目——

身为唯一的幸存者，此重担落于你肩上。你会去追寻此宝的真谛吗？你可曾被告知它的存在？

抉择，一如既往，在你的手里。

================================================

================================================

================================================

There are many powers in Jianghu:

================================================

The Nine Orthodox Sects (正道九派)

- Mount Hua Sword Sect (华山剑派) — Elegant plum blossom swordsmanship, speed and precision

- Shaolin Temple (少林寺) — Oldest sect, Buddhist martial arts, 72 Consummate Arts; moral anchor of the orthodox world

- Wudang Sect (武当派) — Taoist internal cultivation, sword and tai chi arts; the philosopher-warriors

- Emei Sect (峨嵋派) — Female-dominated, balanced offense and defense; led by the zealous Abbess Miejue

- Beggar Sect (丐帮) — Largest membership, information network spanning every city and road

- Kunlun Sect (昆仑派) — Remote western frontier guardians, Silk Road mystics

- Tang Sect (唐门) — Hidden weapons masters and poison experts operating from a fortress-compound in Sichuan

- Heavenly Dragon Monastery (天龙寺) — Buddhist warrior-monks in Dali, southern mountain guardians
creator: WitchUmbra
